div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1128px; height: 1px; padding-top: 8px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 25px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #cccccc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Semantic Audio Communication using Generative AI
